arabicText: نَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ
latinTransliteration: Nastaghfirullāhal-‘Aẓīmal-ladhī lā ilāha illā Huwal-Ḥayyul-Qayyūm
englishTranslation: We seek forgiveness from Allah the Great, besides whom there is no deity, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining.
wolofTranslationStandard: Noongi tuub ci Yàlla mi amul keneen ku nuy jaamu, Ku dund ki, Ku taxawal mbir yépp.
wolofalAjamiScript: نُونْجِ تُوبْ سِ يَٚlَّ مِ اَمُلْ كِنِينْ كُ نُيْ جَامُ كُ دُنْدْ كِ كُ تَخَوَلْ مْبِرْ يِٚpْ

arabicText: وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ وَآلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيمًا كثيراً
latinTransliteration: Wa ṣallā-llāhu ‘alan-Nabiyyi wa ālihi wa ṣaḥbihi wa sallama taslīman kathīrā
englishTranslation: And may Allah bless the Prophet, his family, and his companions, with abundant peace.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te julli ak jaam ñangi ci kaw Yonent bi, ak njabotam ak sàmbam yi.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَمْبَمْ يِ

arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى عَيْنِ الرَّحْمَةِ الرَّبَّانِيَّةِ وَالْيَاقُوتَةِ الْمُتَحَقِّقَةِ
latinTransliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ‘alā ‘aynir-raḥmatir-rabbāniyyati wal-yāqūtatil-mutaḥaqqiqah
englishTranslation: O Allah, send blessings upon the fountain of divine mercy and the realized ruby.
wolofTranslationStandard: Yàlla na nga julli ci leeru yërménde ju kawe ja, te di yaaxu gu dëggu ja.
wolofalAjamiScript: يَٚlَّ نَ نْجَ جُلِّ سِ لِيرُ يِٜrْمِينْدِ جُ كَوِ جَ تِ دِ يَاقُوتَ جُ دِٜجُّ جَ

arabicText: يَا رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةَ وَاجْعَلْهَا خَالِصَةً لِوَجْهِكَ
latinTransliteration: Yā Rabbanā taqabbal minnā hādhihil-waẓīfata wa-j‘alhā khāliṣatan li-wajhik
englishTranslation: O our Lord, accept from us this collective litany (Wazifa) and make it purely for Your sake.
wolofTranslationStandard: Sunu Boroom, nanguil sunu waziifa jii te def ko mu sell ngir sa jëm.
wolofalAjamiScript: سُنُ بُرُومْ نَنْجُيْلْ سُنُ وَزِيفَ جِي تِ دِفْ كُ مُ سِلْ نْجِرْ سَ جِمْ

arabicText: نَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ [5]

englishTranslation: We seek forgiveness from Allah the Great, besides whom there is no deity, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining. (Stanza 5)

latinTransliteration: Wa ṣallā-llāhu ‘alan-Nabiyyi wa ālihi wa ṣaḥbihi wa sallama taslīman kathīrā (6)
englishTranslation: And may Allah bless the Prophet, his family, and his companions, with abundant peace. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te julli ak jaam ñangi ci kaw Yonent bi, ak njabotam ak sàmbam yi. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَمْبَمْ يِ [6]

latinTransliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ‘alā ‘aynir-raḥmatir-rabbāniyyati wal-yāqūtatil-mutaḥaqqiqah (7)

arabicText: يَا رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةَ وَاجْعَلْهَا خَالِصَةً لِوَجْهِكَ [48]
latinTransliteration: Yā Rabbanā taqabbal minnā hādhihil-waẓīfata wa-j‘alhā khāliṣatan li-wajhik (48)
englishTranslation: O our Lord, accept from us this collective litany (Wazifa) and make it purely for Your sake. (Stanza 48)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sunu Boroom, nanguil sunu waziifa jii te def ko mu sell ngir sa jëm. (Wers 48)
wolofalAjamiScript: سُنُ بُرُومْ نَنْجُيْلْ سُنُ وَزِيفَ جِي تِ دِفْ كُ مُ سِلْ نْجِرْ سَ جِمْ [48]

arabicText: نَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ [49]
latinTransliteration: Nastaghfirullāhal-‘Aẓīmal-ladhī lā ilāha illā Huwal-Ḥayyul-Qayyūm (49)
englishTranslation: We seek forgiveness from Allah the Great, besides whom there is no deity, the Ever-Living, the Self-Sustaining. (Stanza 49)
wolofTranslationStandard: Noongi tuub ci Yàlla mi amul keneen ku nuy jaamu, Ku dund ki, Ku taxawal mbir yépp. (Wers 49)
wolofalAjamiScript: نُونْجِ تُوبْ سِ يَٚlَّ مِ اَمُلْ كِنِينْ كُ نُيْ جَامُ كُ دُنْدْ كِ كُ تَخَوَلْ مْبِرْ يِٚpْ [49]

arabicText: وَصَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ وَآلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلَّمَ تَسْلِيمًا كثيراً [50]
latinTransliteration: Wa ṣallā-llāhu ‘alan-Nabiyyi wa ālihi wa ṣaḥbihi wa sallama taslīman kathīrā (50)
englishTranslation: And may Allah bless the Prophet, his family, and his companions, with abundant peace. (Stanza 50)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te julli ak jaam ñangi ci kaw Yonent bi, ak njabotam ak sàmbam yi. (Wers 50)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَمْبَمْ يِ [50]
